description: Provides suggestions or complaints about resources.
comments:
I have suggestions for how things could be better:
- "The chemistry department should hold PSS with TAs and LAs because office hours are so full I can't get any help. We need more capacity. Additionally, discussions should be in person."

- "But I am not eligible for Peer Learning, so I feel left behind. Do they offer similar tutoring for people who don't qualify for AAP? AAP gives extra practice problems similar to what will be tested on, and students not in AAP get left behind."
